Options.OPTION_DESCRIPTION[TripsDataView: Number of output files to keep saved

If enabled, the temporary trip-purpose file is written during auto-saves. That file is necessary to show correct Trip Purpose plot in case the game is restarted but it may cause the auto-save to be slow in bigger cities
